methods.name: rocketapi.rocketapi.RocketAPI.__init__
documentation:
RocketAPI client.

If your base_url is different from the default, you can reassign it after initialization.

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.__init__
documentation:
Threads API client.

Args:
    token (str): Your RocketAPI token (https://rocketapi.io/dashboard/)
    max_timeout (int): Maximum timeout for requests. Please, don't use values lower than 15 seconds, it may cause problems with API.

For debugging purposes you can use the following variables:
    last_response (dict): contains the last response from the API.
    counter (int): contains the number of requests made in the current session.

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.search_users
documentation:
Search for a specific user in Threads

Args:
    query (str): Username to search for

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/search_users

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.get_user_info
documentation:
Retrieve Threads user information by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/user/get_info

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.get_user_feed
documentation:
Retrieve Threads user feed by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through the media (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/user/get_feed

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.get_user_replies
documentation:
Retrieve Threads user replies by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through the media (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/user/get_replies

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.get_user_followers
documentation:
Retrieve Threads user followers by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through followers (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/user/get_followers

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.search_user_followers
documentation:
Search Threads user followers by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    query (str): Search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/user/get_followers

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.get_user_following
documentation:
Retrieve Threads user following by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through followers (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/user/get_following

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.search_user_following
documentation:
Search Threads user following by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    query (str): Search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/user/get_following

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.get_thread_replies
documentation:
Retrieve thread replies by id.

Args:
    thread_id (int): Thread id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through the media (take from the `paging_tokens["downwards"]` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/thread/get_replies

methods.name: rocketapi.threadsapi.ThreadsAPI.get_thread_likes
documentation:
Retrieve thread likes by id.

Args:
    thread_id (int): Thread id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/threads/thread/get_likes

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.__init__
documentation:
Instagram API client.

Args:
    token (str): Your RocketAPI token (https://rocketapi.io/dashboard/)
    max_timeout (int): Maximum timeout for requests. Please, don't use values lower than 15 seconds, it may cause problems with API.

For debugging purposes you can use the following variables:
    last_response (dict): contains the last response from the API.
    counter (int): contains the number of requests made in the current session.

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search
documentation:
Search for a specific user, hashtag or place.

As of September 2024, we no longer recommend using this method, as it now only returns a maximum of 5 users and leaves the places and hashtags arrays empty. Instead, please use the separate methods:
- `search_users`
- `search_hashtags`
- `search_locations`
- `search_audios`
- `search_clips`

Args:
    query (str): The search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/search

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_info
documentation:
Retrieve user information by username.

Args:
    username (str): Username

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_info

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_info_by_id
documentation:
Retrieve user information by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_info_by_id

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_media
documentation:
Retrieve user media by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    count (int): Number of media to retrieve (max: 12)
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through the media (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_media

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_clips
documentation:
Retrieve user clips (videos from "Reels" section) by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    count (int): Number of media to retrieve (max: 12)
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through the media (take from the `max_id` (!) field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_clips

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_guides
documentation:
Retrieve user guides by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through the media (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_guides

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_tags
documentation:
Retrieve user tags by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    count (int): Number of media to retrieve (max: 50)
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through the media (take from the `end_cursor` (!) field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_tags

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_following
documentation:
Retrieve user following by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    count (int): Number of users to return (max: 200)
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through following (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_following

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search_user_following
documentation:
Search user following by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    query (str): Search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_following

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_followers
documentation:
Retrieve user followers by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    count (int): Number of users to return (max: 50)
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through followers (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_followers

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search_user_followers
documentation:
Search user followers by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id
    query (str): Search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_followers

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_stories_bulk
documentation:
Retrieve user(s) stories by user id(s).
You can retrieve up to 4 user ids per request.

Args:
    user_ids (list): List of user ids

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_stories

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_stories
documentation:
Retrieve user stories by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_stories

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_highlights
documentation:
Retrieve user highlights by user id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_highlights

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_live
documentation:
Retrieve user live broadcast by id.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_live

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_similar_accounts
documentation:
Lookup for user similar accounts by id. Typically, up to 80 accounts will be returned.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_similar_accounts

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_info
documentation:
Retrieve media information by media id.

Args:
    media_id (int): Media id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_info

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_info_by_shortcode
documentation:
Retrieve media information by media shortcode. This method provides the same information as the `get_media_info`.

Args:
    shortcode (str): Media shortcode

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_info_by_shortcode

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_likes
documentation:
Retrieve up to 1000 media likes by media shortcode.

Args:
    shortcode (str): Media shortcode
    count (int): Not supported right now
    max_id (str): Not supported right now

Pagination is not supported for this endpoint.

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_likes

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_likes_by_id
documentation:
Retrieve up to 1000 media likes by media id.

Args:
    media_id (int): Media id

Pagination is not supported for this endpoint.

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_likes_by_id

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_comments
documentation:
Retrieve media comments by media id.

Args:
    media_id (int): Media id
    can_support_threading (bool): Set `False` if you want chronological order
    min_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `min_id` parameter to paginate through comments (take from the `next_min_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_comments

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_shortcode_by_id
documentation:
Get media shortcode by media id. This endpoint is provided free of charge.

Args:
    media_id (int): Media id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_shortcode_by_id

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_id_by_shortcode
documentation:
Get media id by media shortcode. This endpoint is provided free of charge.

Args:
    shortcode (str): Media shortcode

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_id_by_shortcode

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_media_id_by_share
documentation:
Get media id by share code (for links like https://www.instagram.com/share/XXXxx356, where XXXxx356 is the share code).

Args:
    share (str): Share code

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/get_id_by_share

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_guide_info
documentation:
Retrieve guide information by guide id.

Args:
    guide_id (int): Guide id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/guide/get_info

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_location_info
documentation:
Retrieve location information by location id.

Args:
    location_id (int): Location id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/location/get_info

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_location_media
documentation:
Retrieve location media by location id.

Args:
    location_id (int): Location id
    page (int): Page number
    max_id (str): Use for pagination
    tab (str): Tab name: recent, ranked (default: recent)

In order to use pagination, you need to use both the `max_id` and `page` parameters. You can obtain these values from the response's `next_page` and `next_max_id` fields.

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/location/get_media

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_hashtag_info
documentation:
Retrieve hashtag information by hashtag name.

Args:
    name (str): Hashtag name

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/hashtag/get_info

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_hashtag_media
documentation:
Retrieve hashtag media by hashtag name.

Args:
    name (str): Hashtag name
    page (int): Page number
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

In order to use pagination, you need to use both the `max_id` and `page` parameters. You can obtain these values from the response's `next_page` and `next_max_id` fields.

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/hashtag/get_media

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_highlight_stories_bulk
documentation:
Retrieve highlight(s) stories by highlight id(s).

Args:
    highlight_ids (list): Highlight id(s)

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/highlight/get_stories

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_highlight_stories
documentation:
Retrieve highlight stories by highlight id.

Args:
    highlight_id (int): Highlight id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/highlight/get_stories

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_comment_likes
documentation:
Retrieve comment likes by comment id.

Args:
    comment_id (int): Comment id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through likes (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/comment/get_likes

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_comment_replies
documentation:
Retrieve comment replies by comment id and media id.

Args:
    comment_id (int): Comment id
    media_id (int): Media id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through replies (take from the `next_max_child_cursor` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/comment/get_replies

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_audio_media
documentation:
Retrieve audio media by audio id.

Args:
    audio_id (int): Audio id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through media (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/audio/get_media

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_audio_media_by_canonical_id
documentation:
Retrieve audio media by audio canonical id.

Args:
    audio_canonical_id (int): Audio canonical id
    max_id (str): Use for pagination

You can use the `max_id` parameter to paginate through media (take from the `next_max_id` field of the response).

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/audio/get_media_by_canonical_id

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_live_info
documentation:
Retrieve live information by broadcast id.

Args:
    broadcast_id (int): Broadcast id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/live/get_info

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.get_user_about
documentation:
Obtain user details from «About this Account» section.

Args:
    user_id (int): User id

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/get_about

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search_users
documentation:
Search for a specific user (max 50 results)

Args:
    query (str): The search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/user/search

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search_hashtags
documentation:
Search for a specific hashtag (max 20 results)

Args:
    query (str): The search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/hashtag/search

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search_locations
documentation:
Search for a specific location (max 20 results)

Args:
    query (str): The search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/location/search

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search_audios
documentation:
Search for a specific audio (max 10 results)

Args:
    query (str): The search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/audio/search

methods.name: rocketapi.instagramapi.InstagramAPI.search_clips
documentation:
Search for a specific clip with a caption that includes the query (max 12 results)

Args:
    query (str): The search query

For more information, see documentation: https://docs.rocketapi.io/api/instagram/media/search_clips
